summary: Expense tracking app with multi-currency support. Users can select their preferred currency (Rupees, Dollars, Yen) from settings.

existing_features.title: Add a currency selector control in the Settings screen (SettingsScreen.tsx) that lets users choose between US Dollar (USD / $), Indian Rupee (INR / ₹), and Japanese Yen (JPY / ¥). Persist the selection to the backend and also store it locally so it survives page refreshes.

Update all currency formatting across the app (expense amounts in ExpenseList, TotalsCards, Dashboard, Calculator, AddExpense, and expenseMapping.ts utilities) to use the user's selected currency symbol and locale formatting (en-US for USD, en-IN for INR, ja-JP for JPY).

new_feature_requests.summary: Add currency selection option in settings (Rupees, Dollars, Yen)
Add a currency preference field to the backend actor that stores the user's selected currency (USD, INR, JPY) and exposes get/set query and update methods for it.
